response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and deep technical versatility across cloud, data, and systems — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise customer-facing technical leadership as required.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and data pipeline experience (AWS, Kubernetes, real-time systems)
Strong track record of technical mentorship, workshops, and open-source leadership
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to GenAI or production LLM systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architecture design
Limited documentation of direct enterprise customer-facing technical leadership
